sourcesContent:
import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { Users, Activity, Calendar, DollarSign, Clock, FileText, CheckCircle, Plus } from 'lucide-react'; import { registerDoctor } from '../services/auth'; import { BarChart, Bar, XAxis, YAxis, CartesianGrid, Tooltip, ResponsiveContainer } from 'recharts'; export default function Dashboard() { const role = localStorage.getItem('role') || 'ADMIN'; const [docForm, setDocForm] = useState({username: '', password: ''}); const [msg, setMsg] = useState({text: '', type: ''}); // Mock data for charts const revenueData = [ { name: 'Mon', revenue: 4000 }, { name: 'Tue', revenue: 3000 }, { name: 'Wed', revenue: 5000 }, { name: 'Thu', revenue: 2780 }, { name: 'Fri', revenue: 6890 }, { name: 'Sat', revenue: 2390 }, { name: 'Sun', revenue: 3490 }, ]; async function handleRegisterDoctor(e){ e.preventDefault(); setMsg({text: '', type: ''}); try { await registerDoctor(docForm); setMsg({text: 'Doctor successfully registered!', type: 'success'}); setDocForm({username: '', password: ''}); } catch(err) { setMsg({text: err.response?.data || 'Failed to register doctor', type: 'error'}); } } const AdminDashboard = () => ( <>

Total Patients

1,248

Total Doctors

64

Appointments Today

142

Revenue (Today)

$8,420

Revenue Analytics

Register Doctor

{msg.text &&
{msg.text}
}
setDocForm({...docForm,username:e.target.value})} required />
setDocForm({...docForm,password:e.target.value})} required />

Recent Appointments

{[1,2,3].map(i => ( ))}
Patient Name Doctor Date & Time Status Action
P
Patient #{i}00

ID: PT-{i}452

 Dr. Sarah Connor Oct 24, 10:30 AM Pending
); const DoctorDashboard = () => ( <>

Today's Appointments

12

Total Patients

340

Pending Reports

5

Upcoming Appointments

Time Patient Name Reason Status
09:00 AM John Doe General Checkup Waiting
10:30 AM Jane Smith Blood Test Results Confirmed
11:45 AM Michael Johnson Fever & Cough Confirmed

Quick Actions

); const PatientDashboard = () => ( <>

Upcoming Appointments

2

New Prescriptions

1

Pending Bills

$120.00

My Appointments

Doctor Date & Time Status Action
Dr. Sarah Connor Oct 26, 10:00 AM Confirmed
Dr. James Wilson Nov 02, 02:30 PM Pending

Recent Medical Records

Blood Test Results

Oct 15, 2023

General Checkup Note

Sep 28, 2023

); return (

Welcome back, {role === 'ADMIN' ? 'Administrator' : role === 'DOCTOR' ? 'Doctor' : 'Patient'}

Here's what's happening in your clinic today.

{role === 'ADMIN' && } {role === 'DOCTOR' && } {role === 'PATIENT' && }
); }
